final_explanation:
Based on the AI model's prediction,
The fact that there is no checking account, because it is empirically associated with a reduced probability of default, is known in the literature as a signal that decreases credit risk, and the model also identifies it as a factor that decreases risk. [1]
The fact that the loan purpose is for a used car, because financial variables and loan terms generally serve as stronger predictors, is known in the literature as a signal that decreases credit risk, and the model also identifies it as a factor that decreases risk. [2]
The fact that the employment duration is less than one year, because extended repayment periods increase the likelihood of default, is known in the literature as a signal that increases credit risk, and the model also identifies it as a factor that increases risk. [3]
Overall, this applicant is likely to have a low risk of default.

4 Risk management 4.1 Tactical risk exposure As to the tactical issues of an increase in the interest level, we have already seen in the previous Subsection 3.5 that the net interest margin (NIM ) evolves in line with the common wisdom, that, however, the impairments in the bond portfolios have a much larger impact in the first year and that the release of hidden reserves may attenuate this impact.

final_explanation_ko:
본 AI가 예측한 결과에 따르면,\n계좌 잔액 부족은 채무 불이행 확률을 낮추는 요인으로 알려져 있으며, 본 모델 역시 이를 위험 감소 요인으로 판단합니다. [1]
중고차량 구매 목적은 일반적으로 금융 변수와 대출 조건보다 약한 예측 지표이지만, 본 모델은 이를 신용 위험 감소 요인으로 인식합니다. [2]
대출 기간이 1년 미만인 경우, 상환 기간이 짧아 채무 불이행 가능성이 증가한다는 점에서 본 모델은 이를 신용 위험 증가 요인으로 판단합니다. [3]
전반적으로 이 고객은 채무 불이행 위험이 낮은 수준으로 평가됩니다.
